resources.string: 白い熊 自由作業盤
Control 白い熊 自由作業盤 automations
Allows same-signer integrations to run 白い熊 自由作業盤 tasks, toggle profiles, and query automation status through documented intents.
Run an 白い熊 自由作業盤 task with one tap
Lets 白い熊 自由作業盤 actions perform system gestures — Back, Recents, the notification and quick-settings panels, the power dialog, and lock screen. No screen content is read.
白い熊 自由作業盤 (Task)
白い熊 自由作業盤 (Styled)
Designable widget — a styled layout a task can update (e.g. a clock).
